chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3023 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 10.02.2025 Mr. Bhagwandas Bheel advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that since last five years, the petitioner is not in contact with him. This petition was filed in the year 2017 and it was lastly fixed on 19.09.2019. Record reflects that no efforts were made to proceed this petition. From the statement of the learned counsel for the petitioner, it appears that either the purpose for filing this petition has been served or the petitioner has lost his interest in the proceedings. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
